'''R2-B4''' was an [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] who was dispatched by [[Amber Comark]] to assist an [[Alliance Special Operations/Legends|Alliance Special Operations]] team during their mission to expose her [[Jesco Comark|father's]] [[Death-Hunter Cyborg|Death Hunter]] project on [[Zeta Zero Nine]]. A battered droid, R2-B4 was nonetheless feisty and loyal. It carried Comark's messages and orders to the Alliance team and was instrumental in the outcome of the mission.<ref name="DH" />

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|9|Death-Hunter}}
